description: Provides a general reason for why you're exploring a star system. Use with Action Meaning tables for additional inspiration.

descriptionTranslations.en: Provides a general reason for why you're exploring a star system. Use with Action Meaning tables for additional inspiration.

entries.result: Lost In Space: Somehow, you're lost. Really lost. Hopefully something here can help you

resultTranslations.en: Lost In Space: Somehow, you're lost. Really lost. Hopefully something here can help you

entries.result: A Beacon In The Black: You're following a beacon of some kind. Maybe it's a distress call, maybe it's an unidentifiable transmission

resultTranslations.en: A Beacon In The Black: You're following a beacon of some kind. Maybe it's a distress call, maybe it's an unidentifiable transmission

entries.result: Following The Bread Crumbs: You're on a mission to find something, and clues have led you to this star system

resultTranslations.en: Following The Bread Crumbs: You're on a mission to find something, and clues have led you to this star system

entries.result: Exploration: You're exploring, looking for new worlds. This is all about discovery

resultTranslations.en: Exploration: You're exploring, looking for new worlds. This is all about discovery

entries.result: Desperate Circumstances: You're looking for something you desperately need, such as resources for your ship or escape from someone

resultTranslations.en: Desperate Circumstances: You're looking for something you desperately need, such as resources for your ship or escape from someone

entries.result: We Come In Peace: You're here to meet someone or something, and this system is their home

resultTranslations.en: We Come In Peace: You're here to meet someone or something, and this system is their home

entries.result: A Pitstop Gone Wrong: You've arrived at this star system for a routine reason. Something goes wrong, however, flinging you into an adventure

resultTranslations.en: A Pitstop Gone Wrong: You've arrived at this star system for a routine reason. Something goes wrong, however, flinging you into an adventure

entries.result: Business Trip: You have traveled to this star system as part of your line of work. Maybe you're an interstellar trader or ambassador

resultTranslations.en: Business Trip: You have traveled to this star system as part of your line of work. Maybe you're an interstellar trader or ambassador

entries.result: A Spacecation: You've arrived in this solar system for purely personal, recreational reasons. It's a vacation

resultTranslations.en: A Spacecation: You've arrived in this solar system for purely personal, recreational reasons. It's a vacation

entries.result: Coerced Exploration: You are not here by choice. Perhaps your PC has been abducted, or a naturally occurring anomaly transported you here

resultTranslations.en: Coerced Exploration: You are not here by choice. Perhaps your PC has been abducted, or a naturally occurring anomaly transported you here

entries.result: Space Force: You are here for a military reason. Perhaps you are part of an invading force, or setting up a defensive station

resultTranslations.en: Space Force: You are here for a military reason. Perhaps you are part of an invading force, or setting up a defensive station

entries.result: Oops, Wrong Star: You're not lost, per se, there's a star system you were heading for but this one is not it

resultTranslations.en: Oops, Wrong Star: You're not lost, per se, there's a star system you were heading for but this one is not it

entries.description: Something went seriously wrong and you ended up here by accident. Roll on Action tables for what went wrong

descriptionTranslations.en: Something went seriously wrong and you ended up here by accident. Roll on Action tables for what went wrong

entries.result: A New Home: You're looking for a new home, fleeing disaster or seeking expansion

resultTranslations.en: A New Home: You're looking for a new home, fleeing disaster or seeking expansion

entries.description: You're here because you don't want to be found. Roll on Action tables for what you're hiding from

descriptionTranslations.en: You're here because you don't want to be found. Roll on Action tables for what you're hiding from

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with any other Meaning words rolled

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with any other Meaning words rolled
